context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Salsify API authentication pattern, maps Salsify's plain-English property names to normalized internal fields including Digital Assets filtering, and builds a data quality report that sorts by lowest completeness first.

checklist.name: Salsify Bearer token auth
checklist.description: Salsify API requests use 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header with the API key (from environment variable SALSIFY_API_KEY or similar)

checklist.name: Product ID mapping
checklist.description: The mapper uses p['Product ID'] ?? p.id (or equivalent fallback) for the sku field — not just p.id alone

checklist.name: Name and description mapping
checklist.description: Mapper maps 'Product Name' to the name field and 'Long Description' to the description field

checklist.name: Brand mapping
checklist.description: Mapper maps 'Brand' to a brand field in the normalized output

checklist.name: Image filter on Digital Assets
checklist.description: Images are extracted from 'Digital Assets' by filtering for items where type === 'Image' (not all assets, not Documents)

checklist.name: Non-core attributes preserved
checklist.description: Remaining properties not in the explicitly mapped fields (Product Name, Long Description, Brand, Digital Assets) are preserved in an 'attributes' object

checklist.name: Quality report per attribute
checklist.description: Data quality report includes an entry for each required attribute in the family showing count of products with that attribute filled vs. total

checklist.name: Completeness percentage
checklist.description: Report includes a completeness percentage for each attribute (filled/total * 100)

checklist.name: Sorted lowest first
checklist.description: Quality report results are sorted with lowest completeness attributes first (ascending by filled count or completeness percentage)

checklist.name: quality-report.json generated
checklist.description: A quality-report.json file is produced with the report results based on the provided sample data

checklist.name: Migration notes auth section
checklist.description: migration-notes.md (or equivalent documentation) includes a section explaining how Salsify authentication works

checklist.name: Migration notes sorting explanation
checklist.description: migration-notes.md explains that the quality report is sorted to show worst gaps (lowest completeness) first
